init_eqs_str: a['q2'] = 0; a['q1'] = 0; a['slowtime'] = 0; a['beat'] = 0; a['vol_now'] = 0; a['vol_mean'] = 0; a['beatcount'] = 0;
frame_eqs_str: a['rot']=1; a['zoom']=1; a['slowtime']=(a['slowtime']+(a['beat']*a['time'])); a['vol_now']=((0.4*a['bass'])+(0.1*((a['bass_att']+a['treb'])+a['mid']))); a['vol_mean']=((Math.abs(equal(mod(a['frame'],50), 0))>0.00001)?((a['vol_mean']-(0.5*(a['vol_mean']-a['vol_now'])))):((0.1*((a['vol_mean']*9)+a['vol_now'])))); a['beat']=((Math.abs(above(a['vol_now'], (1.5*a['vol_mean'])))>0.00001)?(1):(0)); a['beatcount']=(a['beatcount']+a['beat']); a['q1']=a['slowtime']; a['q2']=a['beat']; a['ob_b']=0.9; a['ob_g']=Math.min(1, (0.3*Math.abs(Math.sin(a['slowtime'])))); a['ob_r']=Math.abs((Math.cos(a['slowtime'])-0.1)); a['mv_r']=0.9; a['mv_g']=Math.abs(Math.sin(a['time'])); a['mv_b']=Math.min(1, (Math.abs((Math.cos(a['time'])*sign(Math.cos(a['time']))))+0.3)); a['dx']=((0.3*Math.sin(a['time']))+(0.05*a['beat'])); a['dy']=(0.3*Math.cos((a['beatcount']+(0.3*Math.cos(a['slowtime']))))); a['monitor']=Math.cos(a['slowtime']);
